user.title: Connect Cooper to Anthropic
user.description: Cooper uses your own Anthropic (Claude) API key. It is stored encrypted in Home Assistant and never leaves your install except to call the Anthropic API.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

init.title: Cooper agent
init.description: Give this agent a name and a short persona. Leave 'Recommended settings' on to use sensible defaults.

data_description.prompt: A short, principle-based persona. Cooper's intelligence comes from the model, not from listing scenarios here.
data_description.llm_hass_api: Keep both Assist (home grounding + control) and Cooper (history, vision, memory, automations, proactivity) selected.

data.confirm_bulk_threshold: Confirm when acting on more than this many entities

data_description.observe_mode: In observe mode Cooper says what it would do but changes nothing. Recommended for a new home.
data_description.thinking_budget: Higher values let Claude reason longer but add latency; keep low for voice.

proactive_check.name: Proactive check
proactive_check.description: Wake Cooper to look at the home and decide whether to act or say something.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Why Cooper is being woken (used to focus its attention).

context_entities.name: Context entities
context_entities.description: Entities Cooper should pay attention to.

notify_target.name: Notify target
notify_target.description: Optional notify service to forward Cooper's message to (e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone).

agent_id.name: Agent
agent_id.description: Which Cooper conversation agent to use. Defaults to the first one.

conversation_id.name: Conversation id
conversation_id.description: Optional conversation to continue instead of starting fresh.

cooldown_minutes.name: Cooldown (minutes)
cooldown_minutes.description: Skip if the same reason fired more recently than this.

set_observe_mode.name: Set observe mode
set_observe_mode.description: Turn observe mode on (Cooper changes nothing) or off (Cooper acts within its guardrails).

observe.name: Observe
observe.description: True to observe only, false to allow actions.

kill_switch.name: Kill switch
kill_switch.description: Instantly stop Cooper from taking any action.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: True to refuse all actions, false to resume normal operation.
